summary: Comprehensive testing of Little Eat Italy ordering and reservation system completed. All backend API endpoints (18/18 tests) and frontend UI flows working correctly. German language UI throughout. Full customer journey tested: menu browsing -> cart -> checkout with ASAP option. Admin dashboard functional with Orders/Reservations/Menu/Settings tabs.

minor.issue: OrderItem options field expects price as string (Dict[str, str]), but frontend sends float. Currently working but may cause type issues.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/shop/menu - returns menu with categories (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/shop/settings - returns shop settings with opening hours (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - login with admin/LittleEatItaly2024! (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/auth/verify - token verification (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/shop/orders - create ASAP order (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/shop/orders - create timed order (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/shop/orders - admin can view all orders (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/shop/orders/{id}/status - confirm ASAP order with prep_time_minutes (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/shop/orders/{id}/status - cancel order (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/shop/reservations - create reservation (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/shop/reservations - admin can view all reservations (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/shop/reservations/{id}/status - confirm reservation (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/shop/reservations/{id}/status - reject/cancel reservation (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/shop/settings - update settings (200 OK)
Frontend: Order page (/bestellen) - loads with menu categories
Frontend: Order page - menu items display with prices in EUR format
Frontend: Order page - item modal opens with quantity selector and HINZUFÜGEN button
Frontend: Order page - items added to cart with toast notification
Frontend: Order page - cart shows items, prices, and ZUR KASSE button
Frontend: Order page - checkout form with Name, E-Mail, Telefon, Abholzeit (including ASAP option), Anmerkungen
Frontend: Reservation page (/reservieren) - loads with date/time selectors
Frontend: Reservation page - guest count selector with +/- buttons
Frontend: Reservation page - contact fields and RESERVIERUNG ANFRAGEN button
Frontend: Admin login (/admin) - German UI with EINLOGGEN button
Frontend: Admin shop dashboard (/admin/shop) - stats cards, 4 tabs
Frontend: Admin Orders tab - shows orders with status badges (Neu, Bestätigt, Storniert)
Frontend: Admin Orders tab - order expansion shows customer details and items
Frontend: Admin Orders tab - ASAP order confirmation shows prep time modal with time selector
Frontend: Admin Reservations tab - grouped by date with action buttons
Frontend: Admin Menu tab - categories with items, edit/delete buttons
Frontend: Admin Settings tab - enable/disable toggles, lead times, restaurant info
critical_code_review_comments: Email notifications via Resend are MOCKED/disabled (no RESEND_API_KEY configured) - emails will not be sent to customers
seed_data_creation: Test orders and reservations created with TEST_ prefix for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop ordering and reservation system is fully functional. All 4 admin tabs (BESTELLUNGEN, RESERVIERUNGEN, MENÜ, EINSTELLUNGEN) working. ASAP order flow with prep time modal confirmed working. Email notifications are MOCKED due to missing RESEND_API_KEY. Frontend uses German language throughout.

mocked_apis.Resend email sending: MOCKED - emails will not be sent (no RESEND_API_KEY configured)
